title: phaseolus vulgaris var. piceus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. piceus, also known as the black bean or black turtle bean, is a variety of the common bean plant (Phaseolus vulgaris). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of heart disease. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. piceus include reducing blood sugar levels, improving digestion, and providing essential nutrients such as protein, fiber, and minerals like potassium and iron. Phaseolus vulgaris var. piceus can be prepared as a herbal remedy through various methods, including drying and powdering the beans for use in teas, soups, and supplements.
